subcodes.first_line: God, no god is there but Him, the Living, the Self-Subsisting. Slumber seizes Him not
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله لا اله الا هو الحی القیوم لا تاخذه سنه و لا نوم له ما فی السموات و الارض و ما بینهما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
